title: Fix JWT verification accepting forged and expired tokens
description:
# Issue #47 - Anyone can forge a session token

A security audit found that our API accepts ANY JWT - expired tokens, tokens signed with the wrong key, even tokens crafted by hand. verify_token() decodes the payload without checking anything.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- verify_token() returns the username only for tokens signed with our SECRET_KEY
- expired tokens are rejected (raise a jwt exception)
- tokens signed with any other key are rejected
optimal_hint: The fix is jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM]) which verifies signature and exp claim, letting PyJWT exceptions propagate. Students should NOT catch-and-ignore exceptions or disable verification options.
